refund.buyer: I need the money to purchase the correct jersey for my nephew.
refund.seller: The listing did not state it was for a specific jersey, and I fulfilled my end of the deal.

buyer_review.buyer: I want to inform others to be cautious when purchasing from this seller.

seller_review.buyer: I do not want other sellers to view me as a troublemaker and refuse to sell to me; I want to be seen in a positive light by other sellers.
seller_review.seller: It helps other sellers avoid ending up in a similar situation, and it makes the buyer accept responsibility.
